label: The Bunk Alcove
description: The Bunk Alcove is a narrow sleeping compartment carved into the canteen’s vitrified basalt shell, its surfaces faced with scavenged wreck-metal to match the drinking hall’s utilitarian finish. A single stacked bunk-frame and a bolt-down locker occupy most of the floor, leaving a tight passage along the wall. Shielded luminaires behind mesh baffles cast the same bruise-hued gloom as the canteen, while the air carries the steady breath of condenser units filtering ash and electrostatic grit. Heavy door seals and vox-suppression lining reduce the bastion’s interference to a subdued vibration, preserving a controlled, durable quiet.
